name: sf-skills-plugin
description: Packages Salesforce's public forcedotcom/sf-skills repository as a single auto-updating plugin.

plugins.name: sf-skills
plugins.description: All Salesforce platform skills from forcedotcom/sf-skills: Apex, LWC, metadata, Flows, OmniStudio, Data Cloud, Agentforce, UI bundles, integrations, diagrams, and more. Sourced directly from the public upstream repo so it stays current as Salesforce adds or changes skills.
